epochs.description: The number of epochs to train the model.

epoch_length.description: The number of descent steps in an epoch.

batch_size.description: Number of samples per training batch.

learning_rate.description: Learning rate used by the optimizer.

optimizer.description: The type of optimizer used during training.

salun_retain_weight.description: Beta multiplying the retained diffusion MSE.

salun_mask_sparsity.description: Fraction of configured trainable weights masked out.

salun_mask_max_batches.description: Forget batches used for the fixed saliency mask.

salun_mask_use_amp.description: Whether mask gradients use mixed precision on CUDA.

salun_train_use_amp.description: Whether unlearning updates use mixed precision on CUDA.

salun_mask_seed.description: Isolated RNG seed used while constructing the mask.

sample_dir.description: Directory where generated sample images are saved.

checkpoint_dir.description: Directory where model checkpoints are stored.

salun_alternative_label_source.description: Use the paired retain batch labels as c-prime.

salun_full_model_mask.description: Whether saliency is computed over the full DiT model.
